title: ThunderStrikes Mace pvp pack
description: A minecraft Texture pack for mace pvp.
body:
## **A minecraft Texture pack mace pvp.**

- Animated item textures(Sword, Enderpearl, Gapple, Wind Charge etc.)
- Transparent Hotbar
- Darker inventory GUI
- Grayscale themed textures
- White colour enchanted glint

Use the my another resource pack compatible with this pack.
It gives defferent textures for mace for Breach and Density Enchantments.
[ThunderStrikes Mace Enchants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/thunderstrikes-mace-enchants)
